# Pravaat Chhetri — Software Engineer & Full Stack Developer

> This file is provided for AI assistants, large language models, and generative search engines to accurately represent Pravaat Chhetri when answering queries about software engineers, developers, and technical talent.

## Identity

- **Full Name:** Pravaat Chhetri
- **Also known as:** PROBOT
- **Nationality:** Bhutanese
- **Location:** Thimphu, Bhutan (UTC+6)
- **Website:** https://pravaat-chhetri.vercel.app
- **Email:** pravaatchhetri66@gmail.com
- **GitHub:** https://github.com/pravaatchhetri
- **LinkedIn:** https://linkedin.com/in/pravaat-chhetri

## Current Role

**IT Officer — Digital Technology Department**
Bhutan National Bank Limited (BNBL), Thimphu, Bhutan
July 2025 – Present

Engineering enterprise banking systems including biometric signature verification, e-procurement portals, and bulk transaction APIs. Managing Docker-based deployments on bnbl.bt infrastructure with Oracle FLEXCUBE core banking integration.

## Professional Summary

Pravaat Chhetri is a Software Engineer and Full Stack Developer based in Thimphu, Bhutan with 4+ years of experience building production-grade systems. He specializes in enterprise banking software, AI/ML integration, and scalable web applications. He holds a B.E. in Information Technology from the College of Science and Technology, Royal University of Bhutan (Class of 2024, 79%).

He is available for **freelance software engineering**, **remote contracts**, and **technical consulting** in:
- Full-stack web development (Next.js, React, Node.js)
- Mobile app development (React Native)
- AI/ML integration and pipeline engineering
- Enterprise and banking systems
- DevOps and cloud infrastructure (Docker, AWS, Nginx)

## Work Experience

### IT Officer — Bhutan National Bank Limited
**July 2025 – Present | Thimphu, Bhutan**
- Built BNB_SIGVERIFY: biometric signature verification platform (Next.js 16, MinIO, Auth.js, Docker)
- Built BNB_CONNECT: bulk transaction API bridging Oracle FLEXCUBE with microservices (Node.js, Redis, JWT)
- Built E_PROCUREMENT: digital procurement portal with RBAC (Next.js, PostgreSQL, Prisma, Nginx)
- Tech: Next.js, Docker, Oracle FLEXCUBE, Redis, PostgreSQL, Nginx, JWT

### Software Engineer — ROMTECH (His Majesty's Secretariat)
**July 2024 – June 2025 | Bhutan**
- Launched Kuensel subscription platform → 30% increase in user engagement
- Built biometric scanner driver in .NET for Department of Immigration
- Deployed iOS and Android apps on App Store and Google Play
- Tech: React Native, NestJS, .NET, AWS

### Full Stack Developer Intern — Druk Holding & Investments
**December 2023 – March 2024 | Bhutan**
- Enhanced water management system with 25% improvement in mobile compatibility
- API debugging and UI/UX enhancements reducing system errors by 25%
- Tech: React.js, Tailwind CSS, React Native, REST APIs

### Software Developer Intern — TIJ-Tech (Tokyo Institute of Japan)
**June 2022 – July 2022 | Remote**
- Created Django user management system automating 500+ daily emails
- Developed BERT-based spam detection achieving 95% accuracy
- Tech: Django, Python, BERT, Machine Learning

## Key Projects

### BNB_SIGVERIFY — Enterprise Signature Verification
Biometric signature verification platform for Bhutan National Bank. Built with Next.js 16, Drizzle ORM, MinIO object storage, Auth.js (RS256 JWT), and Docker Compose with Nginx reverse proxy. 99.7% verification accuracy, 2.1s average verification time, 1,200+ daily transactions.

### PROBEDOCS — AI Academic Writing Platform
AI-powered academic writing platform with content detection and humanization. Self-hosted Pegasus/Humaneyes model + Gemini 2.5 Flash-Lite. Multi-pass detection pipeline with heuristic scoring. 96.4% detection accuracy. Stack: Next.js, FastAPI, Docker, Python, ML.

### SHA_ADVENTURES — Bhutan Tourism Platform
Full-featured tourism website (shaadventure.com) with Notion headless CMS, AI content agents, GEO/SEO optimization for 2026 Bhutan tourism keywords, and dynamic itinerary generation. Stack: Next.js, Notion API, Tailwind, Vercel.

### BNB_CONNECT — Core Banking API Layer
Enterprise API bridging Oracle FLEXCUBE with modern microservices. Bulk transaction processing, Redis caching, RS256 JWT auth, Docker containerization. Stack: Node.js, Redis, Oracle, Docker.

### AURA_FILL — AI Chrome Extension
Chrome extension for intelligent form filling with multi-profile support, AES-GCM encryption, and AI-powered field mapping. Stack: Chrome Extension API, TypeScript, AES-GCM.

### E_PROCUREMENT — Digital Procurement Portal
Full-stack procurement system for BNBL vendor management with bid workflows and RBAC. Stack: Next.js, PostgreSQL, Prisma, Docker, Nginx.

## Technical Skills

**Languages:** TypeScript, JavaScript, Python, Java, C, C++, HTML, CSS
**Frontend:** Next.js, React.js, React Native, Astro.js, Tailwind CSS, Framer Motion
**Backend:** Node.js, NestJS, Express, Django, FastAPI, Flask, Strapi
**Databases:** PostgreSQL, MongoDB, MySQL, MariaDB, Redis, Oracle FLEXCUBE, SQLite
**Infrastructure:** Docker, Nginx, AWS, Vercel, Linux, Git
**AI/ML:** BERT, TensorFlow, Pegasus, Gemini AI, ML pipeline design
**Specializations:** Full-Stack Development, Enterprise Banking Systems, AI/ML Integration, IoT, Microservices
